style_effects: Glowing crimson energy auras pulse rhythmically around Blastois's limbs, casting deep red shadows on the ground. Crystalline frost patterns etch across its armored scales, refracting light into prismatic shards that drift upward like slow-motion snowflakes. A cold blue-white aura surrounds its body, intensifying near its eyes and spines, while the lighting mood evokes a serene yet powerful icy battlefield under moonlight. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
